Headline: #63 63rd Temporary Reroute near 63rd Street Beach
ShortDescription: #63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding. Allow extra travel time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Forest Park-bound Blue Line Delays
ShortDescription: Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier sick rider at UIC Halsted. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier sick rider at UIC Halsted.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
